query: postgresql index types btree gin gist performance

top_10.rationale: Apress published book 'PostgreSQL Configuration' by Shaik (2020) — explicit book entry (ISBN-based Springer/Apress DOI), covers PostgreSQL performance configuration including indexing.
Springer Reference entry for 'GiST Index' — authoritative reference work entry directly covering one of the core index types in the query (GiST).
Wikibooks 'PostgreSQL/Indices' — open book format, directly covers GIN, GiST, B-tree index types in PostgreSQL; Wikibooks is an explicitly book-structured resource.

Preprint 'Indexing in PostgreSQL: Performance Evaluation and Use Cases' — covers all six native index types (B-Tree, Hash, GiST, SP-GiST, GIN, BRIN) with performance evaluation, directly matching the query.
Master's thesis 'PostgreSQL database performance optimization' — academic book-adjacent work covering PostgreSQL performance optimization techniques including indexing.

Official PostgreSQL documentation on Index Types — the canonical authoritative reference covering B-tree, Hash, GiST, SP-GiST, GIN, BRIN. Authoritative reference material appropriate for book-mode queries.
Vlad Mihalcea 'PostgreSQL Index Types' — comprehensive expert guide covering B+Tree, Hash, GIN, GiST, BRIN by a well-known PostgreSQL/JPA authority; depth matches a book chapter.
Deep dive 'PostgreSQL Advanced Indexing Guide: GIN, GiST, BRIN, and Partial Index' — covers internals, real-world use cases, and performance characteristics of all query-relevant index types.
Severalnines 'Database Indexing in PostgreSQL' — comprehensive overview from B-tree to GiST spatial indexes to full-text search/JSON/array GIN, covering the full query scope.

pganalyze 'Understanding Postgres GIN Indexes: The Good and the Bad' — detailed treatment of GIN index internals and performance trade-offs, directly relevant to the query's GIN/GiST/performance focus.
